message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 解析处理@EnableTransactionManagement注解

participant "ConfigurationClassPostProcessor" as ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
participant "ConfigurationClassParser" as ConfigurationClassParser
participant "ComponentScanAnnotationParser" as ComponentScanAnnotationParser
participant "AdviceModelImportSelector" as AdviceModelImportSelector
participant "TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector" as TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
participant "ConfigurationClass" as ConfigurationClass
participant "ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader" as ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
participant "AutoProxyRegistrar" as AutoProxyRegistrar
participant "AopConfigUtils" as AopConfigUtils

note over ConfigurationClassPostProcessor, AopConfigUtils: postProcessBeanDefinitionRegistry

activate ConfigurationClassPostProcessor
activate ConfigurationClassParser

ConfigurationClassPostProcessor -> ConfigurationClassParser : parseAnnotationMetadata metadata, String beanName
activate ConfigurationClassParser
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : doProcessConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass, SourceClass sourceClass)
deactivate ConfigurationClassParser

alt [当前被解析的Class被@ComponentScan标注，进行扫描]
    note right of ConfigurationClassParser: @ComponentScan扫描
    activate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser : parse(AnnotationAttributes componentScan, final String declaringClass)
    activate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
    ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ComponentScanAnnotationParser : parse(String className, String beanName)
    deactivate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
    ComponentScanAnnotationParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass(ConfigurationClass configClass)递归解析扫描到的类
    activate ConfigurationClassParser
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassParser : processImports(configClass, sourceClass, getImports(sourceClass), true)
    deactivate ConfigurationClassParser
    deactivate ComponentScanAnnotationParser
else [不进行扫描,处理单个@EnableTransactionManagementimportBean配置类]
    note right of ConfigurationClassParser: 获取到AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    activate AdviceModelImportSelector
    activate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
    ConfigurationClassParser -> AdviceModelImportSelector : selectImports(AnnotationMetadata)
    activate AdviceModelImportSelector
    AdviceModelImportSelector -> TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector : selectImports(AdviceMode)
    activate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
    deactivate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
    deactivate AdviceModelImportSelector
    deactivate AdviceModelImportSelector
    deactivate TransactionManagementConfigurationSelector
    
    note right of ConfigurationClassParser: 递归处理AutoProxyRegistrar、ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration\n添加AutoProxyRegistrar、AspectJAutoProxyRegistrar到关联配置类\n（即标记过EnableTransactionManagement的类）\n的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrars属性中\n按照普通配置类处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration
    activate ConfigurationClass
    ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClass : addImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
    activate ConfigurationClass
    ConfigurationClass -> ConfigurationClassParser : processConfigurationClass
    deactivate ConfigurationClass
    deactivate ConfigurationClass
end

deactivate ConfigurationClassParser
deactivate ConfigurationClassPostProcessor

note left of ConfigurationClassParser: 解析完配置类

activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
note left of ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 加载配置类的配置信息
ConfigurationClassParser -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : loadBeanDefinitions
activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader

activate ConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader -> ConfigurationClass : loadBeanDefinitionsForConfigurationClass
activate ConfigurationClass
ConfigurationClass -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : registerBeanDefinitionForImportedConfigurationClass
deactivate ConfigurationClass
deactivate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader

note right of ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader: 如果是由配置类导入的，直接注册到beanFactory

activate ConfigurationClass
note right of ConfigurationClass: 处理ProxyTransactionManagementConfiguration，导入了切面BeanFactoryTransactionAttributeSourceAdvisor
ConfigurationClass -> ConfigurationClass : loadBeanDefinitionsForBeanMethod
activate ConfigurationClass
note right of ConfigurationClass: 加载@Bean标记的注册方法
ConfigurationClass -> ConfigurationClass : loadBeanDefinitionsFromImportedResources
activate ConfigurationClass
note right of ConfigurationClass: 处理@ImportResource
deactivate ConfigurationClass
deactivate ConfigurationClass

activate AutoProxyRegistrar
note right of AutoProxyRegistrar: 处理AutoProxyRegistrar，注册了InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator\n处理@import，导入的ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar类
ConfigurationClass -> AutoProxyRegistrar : loadBeanDefinitionsFromRegistrars
activate AutoProxyRegistrar
AutoProxyRegistrar -> ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader : registerBeanDefinitions
activate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
deactivate ConfigurationClassBeanDefinitionReader
deactivate AutoProxyRegistrar

activate AopConfigUtils
AutoProxyRegistrar -> AopConfigUtils : 注册InfrastructureAdvisorAutoProxyCreator
activate AopConfigUtils
AopConfigUtils -> AopConfigUtils : registerAutoProxyCreatorIfNecessary
deactivate AopConfigUtils
deactivate AopConfigUtils

@enduml
```
